raw_comment:
Noticed: I noticed that there is way more players of colors in all of the sports rather than coaches
Wonder: I wonder why the percentage of coaches of color are less than 50%. I also wonder why MLB has a low percentage of colored people
Impact: This graph could has the potential to positively impact my community and negatively impact it. Depending on the view you stand from. If you look it at on the positive side you could see that the vast majority of player are colored. It could also be negative if you were looking to be a coach and noticed that people of color are the minority for being coaches.
Title:  Why does racial diversity differ from players to coaches?
ace_sentences: I noticed that there are more players of color in all sports than coaches of color.

I wonder why MLB has a low percentage of colored people.

If you want to be a coach then you can notice that people of color are a minority among coaches.
The title is: Why does racial diversity differ from players to coaches?
